title: Webhook Event Envelope
description: Top-level envelope wrapping every webhook event posted to POST /v1/events. Contains routing metadata common to all event types; the event-specific payload is carried in 'data'.

$schema.description: Canonical URL of the JSON Schema describing this envelope and its event-specific data payload. Consumers can use this to validate the envelope or discover the schema version without parsing other fields.

id.description: UUIDv7 uniquely identifying this event occurrence (not the delivery attempt).

eventType.description: Dot-separated event type name following the '<domain>.<resource-type>.<verb>' convention (e.g. 'calculation.sage.completed', 'plantmanager.equipment.created'). Specificity increases left-to-right. The first segment is the broadest useful namespace (a functional category or product name); the second is the specific resource type; the third is the past-tense verb. Must contain at least two segments; each segment starts with a lowercase letter and contains only lowercase letters and digits.

schemaVersion.description: Semver string (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH) identifying the version of the event-data schema carried in 'data'. Used by consumers to select the correct data schema for validation and deserialization.

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 UTC timestamp recording when the event occurred in the source system.

tenantKey.description: Short identifier for the tenant that owns the resource that generated the event (e.g. 'acme').

data.description: Event-specific payload. The envelope schema intentionally imposes no structure here; individual event-data schemas (keyed by eventType + schemaVersion) constrain this field.
